MINI MINUTES: Pltf + Mr. Fisher appeared ex-parte; submitted proposed orders as ordered by the Court on 11/18 to clerk; Court signed orders and returned same to Mr. Fisher; Mr. Fisher to have orders filed at CCC.

Ntc Of Mtn For U-Visa Certification
Off Calendar Nov-18-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Plaintiff IRIS CABRERA'S Motion For U-Visa Certification will be heard in Department 22 of the Hall of Justice (850 Bryant Street, San Francisco), on November 18, 2013 at 9:00 a.m. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

Ntc Of Mtn File Documents Under Seal For In Camera Review
Off Calendar Nov-18-2013 Continued To Nov-19-13 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 22
MINI MINUTES: Mr. Fisher, plt counsel appeared; no appearance by deft/att; matter continued to 11/20/13 @ 2:00 pm in D22, off record ( no reporter present )

Ntc Of Mtn For U-Visa Certification
Off Calendar Nov-01-2013 Continued To Nov-18-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. MATTHEW H. FISHER OF DA VEGA & FISHER, TEL. NO. (408) 758-8974 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. CECILIA CANDIA, TEL. NO. 553-3403 ALSO APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AFTER THE PLAINTIFF PRESENTED A VALID PROOF OF SERVICE WITH NO OPPOSITION FROM THE OPPOSING PARTY THAT THE PAPERS WERE NOT TIMELY FILED. PLAINTIFF IRIS CABRERA's Motion For U-Visa Certification is continued to November 18, 2013 for the moving party to give the court copies of 1) Federal regulation cited CFR and 2) draft application for the U-Visa Certification. Requested documents to be delivered to Dept. 302 by November 8, 2013. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-17-2013 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Dec-17-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
